dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HCON 63 IH: Authorizing the use of the rotunda of the Capitol for the Congressional National Prayer Breakfast.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Cline (for himself and Mr. Jackson of Illinois) submitted the following concurrent resolution; which was referred to the Committee on House Administration

form.official-title: Authorizing the use of the rotunda of the Capitol for the Congressional National Prayer Breakfast.

section.header: Use of rotunda for Congressional National Prayer Breakfast

paragraph.text: The rotunda of the United States Capitol is authorized to be used on February 5, 2026, for the Congressional National Prayer Breakfast.
The authorization provided under paragraph (1) shall include the service of food and beverages at the event described in such paragraph.

subsection.text: Physical preparations for the conduct of the event described in subsection (a) shall be carried out in accordance with such conditions as may be prescribed by the Architect of the Capitol.
